| |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  | | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | | |  | | --- | | [View email in browser](https://email.puck.news/e/c/eyJlbWFpbF9pZCI6ImRnVDJ4Z1lEQUt2UktxclJLZ0dRekYyOVUzcDhaQ0ZLLWRXMk9MTT0iLCJocmVmIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9wdWNrLm5ld3MvbmV3c2xldHRlcl9hcmNoaXZlcy90aGUtZGFpbHktY291cmFudC8_) | | [The Daily Courant](https://email.puck.news/e/c/eyJlbWFpbF9pZCI6ImRnVDJ4Z1lEQUt2UktxclJLZ0dRekYyOVUzcDhaQ0ZLLWRXMk9MTT0iLCJocmVmIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9wdWNrLm5ld3MvbmV3c2xldHRlcl9hcmNoaXZlcy90aGUtZGFpbHktY291cmFudC8_) | | |  | | --- | | **Iron Manfred, Pelosi‚Äôs Pincer Movement, Baldwin‚Äôs ‚ÄòRust‚Äô Reprisal** | | Happy Friday and welcome back to The Daily Courant, your afternoon memo featuring Puck‚Äôs best new reporting.     First up today, **Matthew Belloni** digs into **David Zaslav** ‚Äôs bombshell epiphany: With frustrations emanating from Wall Street analysts, back-to-back summer box office bombs, and more fresh layoffs on the way at WBD, something needs to change‚Äîand now.     Plus, below the fold: **Lauren Sherman** measures the pressure facing **Kim K** to bring Skims to market. **John Ourand** and MLB commish **Rob Manfred** chew over the league‚Äôs headwinds and silver linings. **Tara Palmeri** charts **Nancy Pelosi** ‚Äôs invasion of the **Biden** bunker. **Peter Hamby** dissects the remarkable impact of women voters over the age of 50. On *Fashion People* , Lauren sits down with legendary stylist **Paul Cavaco** to ruminate on *Esquire* ‚Äôs halcyon days, his 16-year run at *Allure* , and how the industry has changed. On *Somebody‚Äôs Gotta Win,* Tara and **Alex Thompson** unpack the Dems‚Äô internecine war. And on *The Powers That Be* , **Eriq Gardner** joins **Peter Hamby** to break down a pair of pressing legal developments: **Trump** ‚Äôs classified documents case dismissal and **Alec Baldwin** ‚Äôs Rust reprisal. | |  | | [David Zaslav‚Äôs Come-to-Jesus Moment](https://email.puck.) | | MATTHEW BELLONI | | Warner Bros. Discovery‚Äôs well-compensated C.E.O. faces the reality of new pressure from Wall Street analysts, box office bombs, a fresh round of layoffs, and no answer for the worsening economics of television, as he contemplates the inevitable: Something big needs to change. | | | |  | | --- | |  | | [The Shape of Skims](https://email.puck.news/e/c/eyJlbWFpbF9pZCI6ImRnVDJ4Z1lEQUt2UktxclJLZ0dRekYyOVUzcDhaQ0ZLLWRXMk9MTT0iLCJocmVmIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9wdWNrLm5ld3MvY2FuLXRoZS1rYXJkYXNoaWFucy1wdWxsLW9mZi1hLXNraW1zLWlwby8_) | | LAUREN SHERMAN | | The Kardashians are under pressure to turn their most successful brand into an I.P.O.-ready, multichannel revenue machine that rewards their investors, justifies a $4 billion valuation, and fully supplants Victoria‚Äôs Secret‚Äîand soon. Can they pull it off? | |  | | [Iron Manfred](https://email.puck.news/e/c/eyJlbWFpbF9pZCI6ImRnVDJ4Z1lEQUt2UktxclJLZ0dRekYyOVUzcDhaQ0ZLLWRXMk9MTT0iLCJocmVmIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9wdWNrLm5ld3MvbWxiLWNvbW1pc3Npb25lci1ydWxlcy1jaGFuZ2VzLWFyZS1oZWxwaW5nLWF0dHJhY3QteW91bmctdmlld2Vycy8_) | | JOHN OURAND | | MLB commissioner Rob Manfred expounds on the pitch-clock, the multiplatform problem, and the challenge of getting Gen Z to love the game. | |  | | [Fall of the Biden Bunker](https://email.puck.news/e/c/eyJlbWFpbF9pZCI6ImRnVDJ4Z1lEQUt2UktxclJLZ0dRekYyOVUzcDhaQ0ZLLWRXMk9MTT0iLCJocmVmIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9wdWNrLm5ld3Mvd2lsbC1iaWRlbi1kcm9wLW91dC1uYW5jeS1wZWxvc2ktdGlnaHRlbnMtdGhlLXNjcmV3cy8_) | | TARA PALMERI | | With pressure mounting in Congress, the long arm of Nancy Pelosi is working through surrogates to bypass Biden‚Äôs inner circle and convince him to exit the race with dignity. ‚ÄúNancy is historically always a first mover on legislation, and Schumer is always a closer,‚Äù said a senior Hill source with knowledge of the campaign. ‚ÄúIt‚Äôs going to be the collective pressure.‚Äù | | | |  | | --- | |  | | [Polls Over Partisanship: What the Data Really Says About ‚Äô24](https://email.puck.) | | PETER HAMBY | | An incisive conversation with leading lobbyists and researchers surrounding the priorities, concerns, and often-overlooked electoral impact of women voters over the age of 50. | | | |  | | --- | |  | | [Esquire Diaries & Stylist Trade Secrets](https://email.puck.) | | LAUREN SHERMAN | | Legendary stylist Paul Cavaco joins Lauren to discuss his early days styling for Esquire and Bruce Weber, all those Harper‚Äôs Bazaar covers with Fabien Baron and Liz Tilberis, his 16-year run at Allure, and how the industry has changed. | | | |  | | --- | |  | | [Democrats Go to War With Biden](https://email.puck.) | | TARA PALMERI | | Tara is joined by Alex Thompson from Axios at the R.N.C. to share their reactions to Donald Trump‚Äôs closing speech. They then discuss the growing calls from once-friendly lawmakers for Joe Biden to step down from the 2024 presidential race and examine the current tumultuousness within the Democratic Party. | | | |  | | --- | |  | | [Baldwin‚Äôs ‚ÄòRust‚Äô Reprisal & Trump‚Äôs Legal Headspinner](https://email.puck.) | | PETER HAMBY & ERIQ GARDNER | | Eriq Gardner jumps on the horn with Peter Hamby to dissect two pressing legal developments subsumed by a week of high-octane political news: federal judge Aileen Cannon‚Äôs decision to toss Jack Smith‚Äôs classified documents case against Donald Trump, and the dramatic denouement (and potential legal epilogue) to Alec Baldwin‚Äôs ‚ÄòRust‚Äô manslaughter case. | | | |  | | --- | | [Puck](https://email.puck.) | | |  |  |  |  | | --- | --- | --- | --- | | [Facebook](https://email.puck.news/e/c/eyJlbWFpbF9pZCI6ImRnVDJ4Z1lEQUt2UktxclJLZ0dRekYyOVUzcDhaQ0ZLLWRXMk9MTT0iLCJocmVmIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9mYWNlYm9vay5jb20vcHVja2RvdG5ld3M_) | [Twitter](https://email.puck.) | [Instagram](https://email.puck.) | [LinkedIn](https://email.puck.) | | | |  | | --- | | Need help?
